name: Apron
tagline: Uniforms that communicate care before a word is spoken
description: Your team is seen up close, throughout every interaction. An apron with a clean logo and proper construction signals that the care they put into the food extends to everything else.

name: Artist Canvas
tagline: Gallery-quality canvas that feels like art, not a print
description: A canvas print has warmth and texture that any framed print behind glass lacks. For art reproductions, photography, and interior installations that need to feel like objects, not displays.

name: Books
tagline: Printed publications that get kept, not recycled
description: A professionally printed booklet carries your content with a weight that PDFs never will. For catalogues, annual reports, and publications that need to make a physical impression.

name: Car Decal
tagline: Turn every kilometre into a brand impression
description: Your vehicle drives past thousands of people a week. A well-designed car decal turns every commute, every parking lot, every traffic jam into a brand impression that costs nothing to run.

name: Door Hanger
tagline: Your message on their door handle — impossible to ignore
description: No inbox, no algorithm, no gatekeeper — your message lands directly on the door handle of exactly who you want to reach. For property launches, F&B promotions, and neighbourhood campaigns.

name: Easel Stand
tagline: Instant professional displays — no tools, no damage
description: Set it up in 30 seconds. Take it down in 20. Carry it in one hand. The easel stand solves every temporary display problem without drilling holes or asking permission.

name: Embroidery
tagline: Your logo stitched in — not ironed on, not washed out
description: Some logos are too important to just print. Embroidery adds texture, permanence, and a tactile quality that tells anyone who looks closely that the quality goes all the way through.

name: Envelope
tagline: Brand your correspondence before it is even opened
description: Your letter is judged before it is opened. A well-printed branded envelope signals that what is inside is worth reading — for correspondence that needs to arrive with authority.

name: Hang Tag
tagline: The tag that justifies the price before they buy
description: The last thing a customer sees before they decide to buy — or put it back. A well-made hang tag communicates quality before they have opened the product.

name: Letterhead
tagline: Official correspondence that arrives with authority
description: Give your business a professional edge with custom letterhead printing . Whether you're sending out invoices, contracts, or formal letters, a personalised letterhead reinforces your brand identity and adds credibility. Customise with your logo, business name, contact details, and brand colors . Suitable for both corporate and personal stationery , our letterheads are perfect for creating consistent, polished communication. name: Life Size Standee
tagline: The display that stops foot traffic and gets photographed
description: Nothing else at a retail location or event commands attention like a life-size human cutout. People stop, stare, and photograph it — which means your brand gets photographed too.

name: Long Brochures
tagline: The brochure that fits a pocket and makes a full argument
description: Compact enough to carry, substantial enough to sell. DL brochures fit every display rack, every pocket, every handbag — and they hold more information than a flyer without demanding as much time as a booklet.

name: Loose Sheets
tagline: Fast single-sheet printing from 10 copies — no minimum
description: Inserts, notices, table menus, training materials — printed sharp and ready fast. No minimum order, same-day to 2-day turnaround depending on quantity.

name: Luxury Business Card
tagline: The card that changes how they see you before you speak
description: When the card itself is the message. Soft-touch laminate, gold foil, 600gsm cotton stock — before you say another word, they have already revised their opinion of you upward.

name: Money Packet
tagline: Ang baos people keep and reuse — your brand stays visible
description: Ang baos are kept and reused — which means your branding stays in circulation long after the money is spent. Custom red packets that people hold onto because they look too good to throw away.

name: Mugs
tagline: The gift that earns daily visibility on every desk
description: A branded mug sits on the desk and gets picked up multiple times every day. It is the highest-frequency touchpoint in any corporate gift programme — and one of the lowest cost per impression.

name: Name Card
tagline: The card that gets kept, not binned after three seconds
description: You hand it over and they take three seconds to decide if you are worth remembering. Make those three seconds count — with card stock that feels different from the pile, and a finish nobody throws away.

name: NCR Form
tagline: Instant on-site duplicate paperwork — no power needed
description: Invoices, delivery orders, job sheets — NCR forms create instant duplicates on-site, with no power and no printer. The operational essential for logistics, field service, and F&B.

name: NFC Card
tagline: Tap to share everything — no app, no QR scan
description: Tap. Their phone opens your LinkedIn, your portfolio, your booking page — before you have finished shaking hands. No app. No QR code. Just the card.

name: Paper Bag
tagline: Your brand carried through the mall by every customer
description: Every customer who walks out of your store with a branded bag is carrying your marketing through the mall. Make it a bag worth carrying — because a beautiful bag gets reused.

name: Photo Frames
tagline: Give your digital photos a physical home they deserve
description: That photo has been on your phone long enough. Printed, framed, and on a wall or desk — it becomes a memory that actually exists in your physical world.

name: Polo Shirts
tagline: The uniform your team will actually wear off the clock
description: Smart enough for client-facing roles, comfortable enough for a full shift. The corporate uniform standard because it works — and your team will actually wear it.

name: Poster
tagline: Large-format impact that works around the clock
description: A poster in the right location is an audience with everyone who passes. Sharp colour, quality media, sized from A4 to A0 — for retail windows, community boards, and event promotion that needs maximum visibility.

name: PVC Card
tagline: Bank-card quality membership and loyalty cards
description: Membership cards, loyalty cards, access cards — built exactly like a bank card because they need to survive exactly what a bank card survives: daily wallet use for years.

Featuring high-quality, vibrant printing on premium material, your graphics will stand out with sharp details and rich colors. The retractable mechanism ensures hassle-free storage and transport, making it ideal for frequent use. name: Round Neck Shirts
tagline: Custom shirts your team chooses to wear again
description: For the team that needs to look unified without looking corporate. DTF-printed on quality fabric with wash-fast inks — the shirt they wear to the event and keep wearing after.

name: Rubber Stamp
tagline: The detail that says your business is built properly
description: A stamped logo on kraft packaging, a stamped address block on envelopes, a stamped PAID on invoices — small touches that signal a business that cares about every detail.

name: Stickers
tagline: Stick your brand anywhere — it survives everything
description: Laptops, water bottles, helmets, packaging, shop windows — stickers go where other marketing can't. Cut to any shape, waterproof vinyl that survives outdoor conditions.

name: Tote Bag
tagline: A branded bag they carry everywhere — for years
description: People carry tote bags to the market, the MRT, the gym, the office. Brand yours well and it becomes a walking impression that earns its keep for years.

name: Transparent Card
tagline: The card that stands out because nothing else is clear
description: See-through, unmissable. In any card holder, a transparent name card stands out because nothing else in the pile looks remotely like it.

name: UV DTF Sticker
tagline: Printed-on look on any hard surface — peel and press
description: Sticks to glass, metal, wood, acrylic, ceramic — any hard surface — and looks like it was printed directly on. No heat, no tools, no expertise required.

name: Wobbler
tagline: Motion at point of purchase — catches eyes nothing else does
description: Make your promotions impossible to miss with custom wobblers! These dynamic, eye-catching marketing tools sway with movement, instantly attracting customer attention. Ideal for retail stores, supermarkets, and point-of-purchase displays, wobblers highlight special offers, discounts, and new products. Printed on high-quality, durable materials with vibrant colors, they are available in various shapes, sizes, and custom die-cut designs. name: X Stand Banner
tagline: Lightweight display banners for anywhere, any budget
description: Under 2kg, sets up in under a minute, stores under a desk. The X-stand banner gets your brand displayed anywhere without the logistics of a full roll-up setup.
